findings.description: Garbled OCR text is present below the infographic image.
findings.evidence: The HTML includes non-sensical character strings (e.g., '.;t®l', '·:====:====m=u:') interspersed with text extracted from the visual elements of the PDF page.

findings.description: Multi-column layout at the top of the form is flattened into a single column.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, applicant address details are on the left while form control boxes (FEIN, Quarter Ending) are on the right. In the HTML, these are rendered sequentially in a single vertical column.

findings.description: Three-column layout at the bottom of the page is flattened into a single column.
findings.evidence: The 'For Office Use Only', 'MAIL TO:', and 'QUESTIONS:' sections are positioned side-by-side in the PDF but stacked vertically in the HTML.

findings.description: The NCDOR logo is missing from the top of the form.
findings.evidence: The visual NCDOR logo graphic present in the top-left of the PDF is absent in the HTML, though text is extracted.

findings.description: Multiple <h1> tags are present in the HTML, violating the rule that only one <h1> is acceptable as the document title.
findings.evidence:
The HTML contains '

Instructions For Handwritten Forms

' and later '

NCDOR GAS-1201ME Motor Fuels Claim for Refund Special Mobile Equipment

'.
